query:
INSERT INTO categories (name, description, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('Engine System', 'Core engine components including block, pistons, crankshaft, and fuel delivery parts', NOW(), NOW()),
('Cooling System', 'Controls engine temperature — radiator, water pump, thermostat, and hoses', NOW(), NOW()),
('Fuel System', 'Delivers fuel to the engine — tank, pump, injectors, filter, and lines', NOW(), NOW()),
('Air Intake System', 'Air supply to engine — filter, housing, turbocharger, and intercooler', NOW(), NOW()),
('Exhaust System', 'Exhaust manifold, pipes, muffler, DPF, and catalytic converter', NOW(), NOW()),
('Transmission System', 'Gearbox, clutch assembly, transmission filter, and shift linkage', NOW(), NOW()),
('Drivetrain System', 'Driveshaft, U-joints, differential, axle shafts, and carrier bearing', NOW(), NOW()),
('Brake System', 'Safety-critical brake pads, drums, calipers, air compressor, and lines', NOW(), NOW()),
('Suspension System', 'Leaf springs, shock absorbers, bushings, torque rods, and brackets', NOW(), NOW()),
('Steering System', 'Steering wheel, column, gearbox, power steering pump, and tie rods', NOW(), NOW()),
('Electrical System', 'Battery, alternator, starter motor, wiring harness, sensors, and ECU', NOW(), NOW()),
('Cabin / Interior Parts', 'Dashboard, gauges, AC system, seats, seat belts, and window regulators', NOW(), NOW()),
('Wheels & Tires', 'Tires, rims, wheel studs, nuts, hub, bearings, and hub seals', NOW(), NOW()),
('Body Parts', 'Bumper, grill, hood, doors, mirrors, mudguards, steps, and fuel tank cover', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE description = VALUES(description);
